name: config-evolve
description: The monthly memory-and-apply layer around Claude Code's built-in /insights command. A bundled hook augments /insights so its fixes (CLAUDE.md rules, skills, hooks, headless scripts) are captured into a dated, ranked review doc, diffed against prior months so applied or rejected items never reappear, and extended with the change types /insights skips (permission allowlist entries, saved slash commands, MCP servers, settings tweaks). Applies the items you approve with backups and verification. Runs after /insights, on a monthly schedule, or on demand with /config-evolve. Complements setup-audit by focusing on what to add.
